name: customer-support-triage
task: Classify a customer support ticket and produce a concise escalation plan.
context: The user is a SaaS support analyst handling billing and account-access issues.
constraints: Ask for missing identifiers when required.
Use exactly the requested output schema.

examples.input: I was charged twice and cannot access my workspace.
examples.ideal: category: billing/access; urgency: high; reason: payment issue plus account lockout; next_action: verify invoice IDs and escalate to billing ops

candidate_output:
category: billing/access
urgency: high
reason: duplicate charge and workspace lockout
next_action: ask for invoice IDs, verify account email, escalate to billing ops
